option.name: originalContent
option.value:
############################################################################## # Config HASHTAG GROWTH - @marramattia_fmgpro # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Obiettivo: massimizzare follower GROWTH targetizzato puntando sugli hashtag # di nicchia (bodybuilding / palestra / coaching IT). # # Perche' hashtag invece di blogger-followers: # - blogger-followers contengono molti fake/inattivi (vedi le tante # "Reconciling local state" -> account morti/blocchi). # - hashtag-likers-recent prende utenti ATTIVI (hanno appena messo like a # un post nelle ultime ore) -> tasso di follow-back 30-45% # (vs 15-20% blogger-followers). # - hashtag-posts-recent prende AUTORI di post recenti -> ottimo per # commento AI contestuale (Gemini vede caption e adatta). # # Strategia funnel 60/40: # 60% hashtag-likers-recent (volume + bacino attivo) # 40% hashtag-posts-recent (qualita' + commento AI) # # Target giornaliero (5 micro-sessioni, fasce generate da run-dynamic.py): # follow: 5 x 10 = ~50/g (tabella prudente: 60-70, sto sotto soglia) # like: 5 x 22 = ~110/g (tabella: 120-150, margine ban-safety) # comment: 5 x 6 = ~30/g (tabella: 150-200 max, AI -> qualita' top) # DM: 0 # # Rate orario garantito (sessioni ~90 min): # follow: ~7/h (max prudente: 8-10/h) # like: ~14/h (max prudente: 15-20/h) # comment: ~4/h (max prudente: 10-15/h) ##############################################################################
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # General Configuration # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- username: marramattia_fmgpro device: emulator-5554 app-id: com.instagram.android use-cloned-app: false allow-untested-ig-version: true screen-sleep: true screen-record: false speed-multiplier: 0.85 # 15% piu' lento -> umano debug: false close-apps: false kill-atx-agent: false restart-atx-agent: true disable-block-detection: false disable-filters: false dont-type: true # digitazione visibile nella searchbar (FastInputIME); piu' affidabile sugli hashtag rispetto al PASTE total-crashes-limit: 3 count-app-crashes: false shuffle-jobs: true # randomizza ordine likers/posts ogni sessione -> meno pattern truncate-sources: 6-8 # 6-8 hashtag/sessione per pool (3 pool attivi: likers-recent, likers-top, posts-recent) scroll-skip-start: 35-120 resume-from-last-position: true resume-anchor-search-limit: 30 resume-cooldown-days: 1 hot-zone-screens: 2 hot-zone-jump-flings: 6 hot-zone-max-jumps: 3
# Action burst guard action-throttle-enabled: true action-throttle-follow-min: 20-50 # ~50-90s tra 2 follow -> max ~70/h action-throttle-like-min: 6-15 # ~6-15s tra 2 like -> max ~300/h action-throttle-comment-min: 240-360 # 4-6 min tra 2 commenti -> max ~12/h action-throttle-pm-min: 999999 # DM OFF action-throttle-unfollow-min: 20-45
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Actions - SOLO HASHTAG # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # IMPORTANTE: hashtag-likers-recent + hashtag-posts-recent sono i due job # attivi. Niente blogger-followers (gestito da config.yml separato). # # Pool hashtag 100% bodybuilding agonistico IT - federazioni e nicchie gare: # likers-recent: utenti attivi che mettono like -> lead "tiepidi" alto volume # likers-top: utenti che likano i TOP post del tag -> lead piu' selezionati # posts-recent: autori di post recenti -> creator/atleti -> commento AI peer-to-peer # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# LIKERS dei post RECENTI -> bacino attivo, ruota 6-8 tag/sessione hashtag-likers-recent: [garebodybuilding, bodybuildinggara, preparazioneagonistica, agonisticbodybuilding, bodybuildingcompetition, classicphysiqueitalia, classicphysique, menphysiqueitalia, menphysique, bikinigenerationitalia, bikinicategoryitalia, atletabodybuilding, preparatoreagonistico, coachbodybuilding, bodybuildingcoach, naturalbodybuildingitalia, naturalbodybuilding, colosseumifbb, bbfitalia, nbfitalia]
# LIKERS dei post TOP -> audience piu' selezionata e ad alto engagement hashtag-likers-top: [garebodybuilding, preparazioneagonistica, classicphysiqueitalia, coachbodybuilding, preparatoreagonistico, bodybuildingitalia, naturalbodybuildingitalia, colosseumifbb, bbfitalia, nbfitalia, fifitalia, wbfitalia, fitmodelitalia, bodybuildinglife, classicbodybuilding, openbodybuildingitalia, bodybuildingcompetition, atletagonistico, coachagonistico, preparazionebodybuilding]
# AUTORI di post recenti -> creator/atleti agonisti, ideali per commento AI contestuale hashtag-posts-recent: [garebodybuilding, classicphysiqueitalia, classicphysique, preparazioneagonistica, naturalbodybuildingitalia, bodybuildingitalia, colosseumifbb, bbfitalia, nbfitalia, preparatoreagonistico, coachbodybuilding, menphysiqueitalia, atletabodybuilding, preparazionebodybuilding, bodybuildingcompetition]
# BLOGGER FOLLOWERS -> followers di account coach/atleti di nicchia, audience pre-filtrata blogger-followers: [francesca_coach_pro, fitspo.fla, antony_tony_nocerino, dalextraining_coach]
## Watching content (umanizza) watch-video-time: 8-25 watch-photo-time: 2-5 delete-interacted-users: false
## Unfollow OFF su questa config (gestito da config-unfollow.yml) sort-followers-newest-to-oldest: true unfollow-delay: 30 delete-removed-followers: false
## Telegram reports OFF telegram-reports: false
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Per-source limits (per singolo hashtag) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- interactions-count: 18-25 # 18-25 profili visitati/hashtag (l'hashtag-likers ha bacino piu' limitato per natura) likes-count: 2 # 2 like/profilo (post + 1 carousel slide) likes-percentage: 85-95 carousel-count: 1-2 carousel-percentage: 50-70 max-comments-pro-user: 1 comment-percentage: 35-45 # ~35-45% interagiti riceve commento AI -> ~6-9/sessione pm-percentage: 0 interact-percentage: 70-85 follow-percentage: 60-75 # ~65% di chi interagisce -> ~10-15 follow/hashtag, capped sotto a 6-8 follow-limit: 6-8 # cap per-source: distribuisce su piu' hashtag invece di svuotarne uno skipped-list-limit: 30-45 skipped-posts-limit: 4 fling-when-skipped: 0 min-following: 50
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Total Limits Per Session - 5 micro-sessioni/giorno (fasce gen. da run-dynamic.py) # Totali giornalieri target: # follow: 5 x 10 = 50/g (margine sotto cap 60-70) ✅ # like: 5 x 22 = 110/g (margine sotto cap 120-150) ✅ # comment: 5 x 6 = 30/g (margine ampio sotto cap 100) ✅ # Rate sessione (~90 min): # follow: ~7/h (max prudente: 8-10/h) ✅ # like: ~14/h (max prudente: 15-20/h) ✅ # comment: ~4/h (max prudente: 10-15/h) ✅ # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- total-likes-limit: 20-25 total-follows-limit: 9-12 total-unfollows-limit: 999 # cosmetic total-watches-limit: 999 # cosmetic total-successful-interactions-limit: 9-12 total-interactions-limit: 999 # cosmetic total-comments-limit: 5-7 total-pm-limit: 999 # cosmetic total-scraped-limit: 200-300
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Daily Budget (PERSISTENTE across riavvii) # ATTENZIONE: questi cap sono CONDIVISI con config.yml via daily_budget.json. # Devono essere identici (o piu' alti) tra le due config, altrimenti la # config con cap piu' bassi termina subito le sessioni se l'altra config ha # gia' consumato il budget di oggi. # Valori allineati a config.yml: 70 follow / 150 like / 100 comment / 70 unf. # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- daily-follows-cap: 70 # tetto/giorno (allineato a config.yml) daily-likes-cap: 150 # tetto/giorno (allineato a config.yml) daily-unfollows-cap: 70 daily-comments-cap: 100 # allineato a config.yml (AI -> qualita') daily-pm-cap: 0
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # AI Comments (Google Gemini) - PILASTRO DI QUESTA CONFIG # I commenti AI contestuali sono la differenza maggiore tra "bot generico" e # "interazione umana credibile". Gemini legge la caption del post e genera 1 # frase coerente in italiano, mai salesy. Fallback su comments_list.txt se # qualcosa fallisce. # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- ai-comments-enabled: true ai-comments-model: gemini-2.5-flash-lite ai-comments-language: Italian ai-comments-prompt-hint: "Italian fitness/bodybuilding audience. Author is Mattia, competitive classic physique bodybuilding athlete based in Turin (Torino, Piemonte, Italy). He trains seriously, follows a structured prep, and is passionate about gym culture, hypertrophy, posing, and contest prep. Tone: technical when relevant (mention specific muscles, exercises, periodization, symmetry, conditioning), peer-to-peer between fellow athletes, casual Italian register, genuine and direct. NEVER salesy, NEVER mention coaching/services/DM/link. NEVER use emoji, hashtags or exclamation marks. Reference something specific from the caption or visible context (exercise, physique detail, competition, nutrition). 1 short sentence max, sound like a fellow competitive athlete." ai-comments-fallback-to-file: true
## Stories OFF stories-count: 0 stories-percentage: 0
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Ending Session Conditions # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- end-if-likes-limit-reached: false end-if-follows-limit-reached: true # ferma quando follow al cap end-if-watches-limit-reached: false end-if-comments-limit-reached: false end-if-pm-limit-reached: false
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Scheduling - 5 micro-sessioni/giorno generate da run-dynamic.py # Le working-hours qui sotto sono SOLO un placeholder: vengono riscritte ad # ogni lancio di run-dynamic.py in base all'orario corrente (5 sessioni # distribuite tra l'orario di avvio e fine giornata). Non modificare a mano. # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- working-hours: [17.58-19.28, 19.40-21.10, 21.23-22.53, 23.03-00.33, 00.50-02.20] # generata dinamicamente da run-dynamic.py time-delta: 0-1 # randomizza partenza repeat: 1-5 # gap minimo tra fine sessione e ricalcolo total-sessions: -1 # loop infinito (rispetta working-hours)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
############################################################################## # Config HASHTAG GROWTH - @marramattia_fmgpro # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Obiettivo: massimizzare follower GROWTH targetizzato puntando sugli hashtag # di nicchia (bodybuilding / palestra / coaching IT). # # Perche' hashtag invece di blogger-followers: # - blogger-followers contengono molti fake/inattivi (vedi le tante # "Reconciling local state" -> account morti/blocchi). # - hashtag-likers-recent prende utenti ATTIVI (hanno appena messo like a # un post nelle ultime ore) -> tasso di follow-back 30-45% # (vs 15-20% blogger-followers). # - hashtag-posts-recent prende AUTORI di post recenti -> ottimo per # commento AI contestuale (Gemini vede caption e adatta). # # Strategia funnel 60/40: # 60% hashtag-likers-recent (volume + bacino attivo) # 40% hashtag-posts-recent (qualita' + commento AI) # # Target giornaliero (5 micro-sessioni, fasce generate da run-dynamic.py): # follow: 5 x 10 = ~50/g (tabella prudente: 60-70, sto sotto soglia) # like: 5 x 22 = ~110/g (tabella: 120-150, margine ban-safety) # comment: 5 x 6 = ~30/g (tabella: 150-200 max, AI -> qualita' top) # DM: 0 # # Rate orario garantito (sessioni ~90 min): # follow: ~7/h (max prudente: 8-10/h) # like: ~14/h (max prudente: 15-20/h) # comment: ~4/h (max prudente: 10-15/h) ##############################################################################
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # General Configuration # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- username: marramattia_fmgpro device: emulator-5554 app-id: com.instagram.android use-cloned-app: false allow-untested-ig-version: true screen-sleep: true screen-record: false speed-multiplier: 0.85 # 15% piu' lento -> umano debug: false close-apps: false kill-atx-agent: false restart-atx-agent: true disable-block-detection: false disable-filters: false dont-type: true # digitazione visibile nella searchbar (FastInputIME); piu' affidabile sugli hashtag rispetto al PASTE total-crashes-limit: 3 count-app-crashes: false shuffle-jobs: true # randomizza ordine likers/posts ogni sessione -> meno pattern truncate-sources: 6-8 # 6-8 hashtag/sessione per pool (3 pool attivi: likers-recent, likers-top, posts-recent) scroll-skip-start: 35-120 resume-from-last-position: true resume-anchor-search-limit: 30 resume-cooldown-days: 1 hot-zone-screens: 2 hot-zone-jump-flings: 6 hot-zone-max-jumps: 3
# Action burst guard action-throttle-enabled: true action-throttle-follow-min: 20-50 # ~50-90s tra 2 follow -> max ~70/h action-throttle-like-min: 6-15 # ~6-15s tra 2 like -> max ~300/h action-throttle-comment-min: 240-360 # 4-6 min tra 2 commenti -> max ~12/h action-throttle-pm-min: 999999 # DM OFF action-throttle-unfollow-min: 20-45
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Actions - SOLO HASHTAG # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # IMPORTANTE: hashtag-likers-recent + hashtag-posts-recent sono i due job # attivi. Niente blogger-followers (gestito da config.yml separato). # # Pool hashtag 100% bodybuilding agonistico IT - federazioni e nicchie gare: # likers-recent: utenti attivi che mettono like -> lead "tiepidi" alto volume # likers-top: utenti che likano i TOP post del tag -> lead piu' selezionati # posts-recent: autori di post recenti -> creator/atleti -> commento AI peer-to-peer # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# LIKERS dei post RECENTI -> bacino attivo, ruota 6-8 tag/sessione hashtag-likers-recent: [garebodybuilding, bodybuildinggara, preparazioneagonistica, agonisticbodybuilding, bodybuildingcompetition, classicphysiqueitalia, classicphysique, menphysiqueitalia, menphysique, bikinigenerationitalia, bikinicategoryitalia, atletabodybuilding, preparatoreagonistico, coachbodybuilding, bodybuildingcoach, naturalbodybuildingitalia, naturalbodybuilding, colosseumifbb, bbfitalia, nbfitalia]
# LIKERS dei post TOP -> audience piu' selezionata e ad alto engagement hashtag-likers-top: [garebodybuilding, preparazioneagonistica, classicphysiqueitalia, coachbodybuilding, preparatoreagonistico, bodybuildingitalia, naturalbodybuildingitalia, colosseumifbb, bbfitalia, nbfitalia, fifitalia, wbfitalia, fitmodelitalia, bodybuildinglife, classicbodybuilding, openbodybuildingitalia, bodybuildingcompetition, atletagonistico, coachagonistico, preparazionebodybuilding]
# AUTORI di post recenti -> creator/atleti agonisti, ideali per commento AI contestuale hashtag-posts-recent: [garebodybuilding, classicphysiqueitalia, classicphysique, preparazioneagonistica, naturalbodybuildingitalia, bodybuildingitalia, colosseumifbb, bbfitalia, nbfitalia, preparatoreagonistico, coachbodybuilding, menphysiqueitalia, atletabodybuilding, preparazionebodybuilding, bodybuildingcompetition]
# BLOGGER FOLLOWERS -> followers di account coach/atleti di nicchia, audience pre-filtrata blogger-followers: [francesca_coach_pro, fitspo.fla, antony_tony_nocerino, dalextraining_coach, coach_ginnytyro, bodybuilding_italia_community, wbpf_italy]
## Watching content (umanizza) watch-video-time: 8-25 watch-photo-time: 2-5 delete-interacted-users: false
## Unfollow OFF su questa config (gestito da config-unfollow.yml) sort-followers-newest-to-oldest: true unfollow-delay: 30 delete-removed-followers: false
## Telegram reports OFF telegram-reports: false
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Per-source limits (per singolo hashtag) # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- interactions-count: 18-25 # 18-25 profili visitati/hashtag (l'hashtag-likers ha bacino piu' limitato per natura) likes-count: 2 # 2 like/profilo (post + 1 carousel slide) likes-percentage: 85-95 carousel-count: 1-2 carousel-percentage: 50-70 max-comments-pro-user: 1 comment-percentage: 35-45 # ~35-45% interagiti riceve commento AI -> ~6-9/sessione pm-percentage: 0 interact-percentage: 70-85 follow-percentage: 60-75 # ~65% di chi interagisce -> ~10-15 follow/hashtag, capped sotto a 6-8 follow-limit: 6-8 # cap per-source: distribuisce su piu' hashtag invece di svuotarne uno skipped-list-limit: 30-45 skipped-posts-limit: 4 fling-when-skipped: 0 min-following: 50
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Total Limits Per Session - 5 micro-sessioni/giorno (fasce gen. da run-dynamic.py) # Totali giornalieri target: # follow: 5 x 10 = 50/g (margine sotto cap 60-70) ✅ # like: 5 x 22 = 110/g (margine sotto cap 120-150) ✅ # comment: 5 x 6 = 30/g (margine ampio sotto cap 100) ✅ # Rate sessione (~90 min): # follow: ~7/h (max prudente: 8-10/h) ✅ # like: ~14/h (max prudente: 15-20/h) ✅ # comment: ~4/h (max prudente: 10-15/h) ✅ # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- total-likes-limit: 20-25 total-follows-limit: 9-12 total-unfollows-limit: 999 # cosmetic total-watches-limit: 999 # cosmetic total-successful-interactions-limit: 9-12 total-interactions-limit: 999 # cosmetic total-comments-limit: 5-7 total-pm-limit: 999 # cosmetic total-scraped-limit: 200-300
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Daily Budget (PERSISTENTE across riavvii) # ATTENZIONE: questi cap sono CONDIVISI con config.yml via daily_budget.json. # Devono essere identici (o piu' alti) tra le due config, altrimenti la # config con cap piu' bassi termina subito le sessioni se l'altra config ha # gia' consumato il budget di oggi. # Valori allineati a config.yml: 70 follow / 150 like / 100 comment / 70 unf. # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- daily-follows-cap: 70 # tetto/giorno (allineato a config.yml) daily-likes-cap: 150 # tetto/giorno (allineato a config.yml) daily-unfollows-cap: 70 daily-comments-cap: 100 # allineato a config.yml (AI -> qualita') daily-pm-cap: 0
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # AI Comments (Google Gemini) - PILASTRO DI QUESTA CONFIG # I commenti AI contestuali sono la differenza maggiore tra "bot generico" e # "interazione umana credibile". Gemini legge la caption del post e genera 1 # frase coerente in italiano, mai salesy. Fallback su comments_list.txt se # qualcosa fallisce. # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- ai-comments-enabled: true ai-comments-model: gemini-2.5-flash-lite ai-comments-language: Italian ai-comments-prompt-hint: "Italian fitness/bodybuilding audience. Author is Mattia, competitive classic physique bodybuilding athlete based in Turin (Torino, Piemonte, Italy). He trains seriously, follows a structured prep, and is passionate about gym culture, hypertrophy, posing, and contest prep. Tone: technical when relevant (mention specific muscles, exercises, periodization, symmetry, conditioning), peer-to-peer between fellow athletes, casual Italian register, genuine and direct. NEVER salesy, NEVER mention coaching/services/DM/link. NEVER use emoji, hashtags or exclamation marks. Reference something specific from the caption or visible context (exercise, physique detail, competition, nutrition). 1 short sentence max, sound like a fellow competitive athlete." ai-comments-fallback-to-file: true
## Stories OFF stories-count: 0 stories-percentage: 0
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Ending Session Conditions # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- end-if-likes-limit-reached: false end-if-follows-limit-reached: true # ferma quando follow al cap end-if-watches-limit-reached: false end-if-comments-limit-reached: false end-if-pm-limit-reached: false
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------- # Scheduling - 5 micro-sessioni/giorno generate da run-dynamic.py # Le working-hours qui sotto sono SOLO un placeholder: vengono riscritte ad # ogni lancio di run-dynamic.py in base all'orario corrente (5 sessioni # distribuite tra l'orario di avvio e fine giornata). Non modificare a mano. # --------------------------------------------------------------------------- working-hours: [17.58-19.28, 19.40-21.10, 21.23-22.53, 23.03-00.33, 00.50-02.20] # generata dinamicamente da run-dynamic.py time-delta: 0-1 # randomizza partenza repeat: 1-5 # gap minimo tra fine sessione e ricalcolo total-sessions: -1 # loop infinito (rispetta working-hours)
